LRO stress / pH increase oval arrow to NSY-1 / MAPKKK yellow oval — edge encoded as LRO→NSY-1 [unconfirmed against figure in verification]

SEK-1 / MAPKK yellow oval solid arrow to PMK-1 / p38 MAPK yellow oval
PMK-1 / p38 MAPK solid arrow to ATF-7 purple box, lower-left
PMK-1 branch upward arrow to DAF-16 / FOXO — transcription flagged as uncertain link [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
ATF-7 arrow into nucleus targeting antimicrobial defence genes box
DAF-16 / FOXO arrow to cellular stress response genes in nucleus
SKN-1 / Nrf2 arrow converging on cellular stress response genes in nucleus
SKN-1 / Nrf2 arrow also converging on antimicrobial defence genes in nucleus [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
HSF-1 arrow to cellular stress response genes in nucleus
HSF-1 arrow to ROS white box — end type and significance uncertain; flagged in transcription [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
ATFS-1 / ATF-4 arrow to cellular stress response genes in nucleus
ATFS-1 / ATF-4 arrow also to antimicrobial defence genes in nucleus
Mitochondria UPRmt solid leftward arrow to HSP-60 blue oval
Pyoverdine siderophore/iron link to +Fe3+ to HIF-1; end type uncertain — could be activating or inhibiting; flagged as uncertain
AMPK arrow to HIF-1 — direction and end type flagged as uncertain in transcription
HIF-1 arrow to ESRE element in nucleus
mtROS text at mitochondrion with arrow to AMPK — flagged as uncertain
ExoA (in lumen) T-bar to Translation — inhibition; end type flagged as uncertain [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Translation node arrow to AMPK — flagged as uncertain [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Translation T-bar/arrow to ZIP-2 — end type uncertain; flagged in transcription

CEBP-1/2 purple box arrow to ZIP-2 purple box
ZIP-2 arrow to ESRE in nucleus
ZIP-2 arrow to antimicrobial defence genes — end type uncertain (possibly activation despite T-bar flag); flagged
PCN (green hexagon, far right in lumen) downward arrow to NHR-86 / HNF-4 — flagged as uncertain
NHR-86 / HNF-4 arrow to antimicrobial defence genes in nucleus
ESRE response element in nucleus feeds into cellular stress response genes and antimicrobial defence genes boxes [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
FSHR-1 transmembrane receptor has a downward arrow terminating with an explicit '?' label in the figure — deliberate authorial uncertainty about downstream target
